message:
feat(fuzz): add five structure-aware fuzz targets for client/event-loop surfaces

Expands the fuzz workspace with coverage for the command and
event-loop-adjacent parser surfaces that previously had no
fuzz-driven regression net. All new targets follow the same pattern
as the existing ones: they use libfuzzer-sys + arbitrary, run as
[[bin]] entries under fuzz/Cargo.toml, and ship a small seed corpus
so cargo fuzz starts with non-trivial inputs instead of random junk.

New targets, each with a minimal seed corpus under
fuzz/corpus/<target>/:

- fuzz_client_tracking: CLIENT TRACKING option parsing. Structure-
  aware state round-trip (parse -> back to argv -> parse again)
  combined with raw argv canonicalization checks against
  parse_client_tracking_state.

- fuzz_client_reply: CLIENT REPLY mode parsing and suppression
  state machine. Structure-aware sequence differential against a
  shadow model that mirrors the suppression semantics, plus raw
  command-stream validation.

- fuzz_migrate_request: MIGRATE request parsing. Option-matrix
  exercises COPY/REPLACE/AUTH/AUTH2/KEYS permutations and asserts
  the argv form round-trips back to an equivalent MigrateKeySpec
  through parse_migrate_request.

- fuzz_keyspace_events: notify-keyspace-events config string
  parsing. Structure-aware flag-model validation + canonical string
  round-trip (parse -> flag bitmap -> to_string -> parse == identity
  for the canonical representation).

- fuzz_eventloop_validators: event-loop planning and validator
  invariants. Structure-aware state-machine checks + raw phase-trace
  replay to catch transitions that the unit tests never reach.

Supporting changes:

- fuzz/Cargo.toml: adds fr-eventloop to the workspace dependency
  list and the five new [[bin]] entries.
- fuzz/Cargo.lock: regenerated to pick up fr-server and its transitive
  mio/wasi dependencies which the new targets pull in.
- fuzz/README.md: documents each new target in the existing table +
  adds cargo +nightly fuzz run invocations so new contributors can
  exercise them without spelunking through fuzz_targets/.
- fuzz/fuzz_targets/fuzz_inline_parser.rs: rustfmt let-else chain
  collapse on the Terminator::Crlf | Lf branch; no behaviour change.
- fuzz/fuzz_targets/fuzz_rdb_structured.rs: drops an unused
  RDB_TYPE_STREAM constant that clippy was flagging.

@@ -17,6 +17,11 @@ This directory contains fuzz targets for security-critical parser surfaces.
 | `fuzz_psync_reply` | Replica PSYNC reply parsing | Structure-aware parser shape validation + raw canonicalization |
 | `fuzz_tls_config` | TLS config directive parsing and apply planning | Structure-aware parser/validator invariants + rewrite/apply determinism |
 | `fuzz_lua_eval` | Embedded Lua parser and evaluator | Structure-aware pure-script determinism + whitespace/semicolon invariance |
+| `fuzz_client_tracking` | `CLIENT TRACKING` option parsing and caching-mode validation | Structure-aware state round-trip + raw argv canonicalization |
+| `fuzz_client_reply` | `CLIENT REPLY` mode parsing and suppression state transitions | Structure-aware sequence differential against a shadow model + raw command-stream validation |
+| `fuzz_migrate_request` | `MIGRATE` request parsing | Structure-aware option-matrix validation + canonical argv round-trip |
+| `fuzz_keyspace_events` | `notify-keyspace-events` config parsing | Structure-aware flag-model validation + canonical string round-trip |
+| `fuzz_eventloop_validators` | Event-loop planning and validator invariants | Structure-aware state-machine/model checks + raw phase-trace replay |
 
 ## Running Fuzz Tests
 
@@ -54,6 +59,21 @@ cargo +nightly fuzz run fuzz_tls_config
 # Run Lua parser/evaluator fuzzer
 cargo +nightly fuzz run fuzz_lua_eval
 
+# Run CLIENT TRACKING parser/invariant fuzzer
+cargo +nightly fuzz run fuzz_client_tracking
+
+# Run CLIENT REPLY state-machine fuzzer
+cargo +nightly fuzz run fuzz_client_reply
+
+# Run MIGRATE request parser fuzzer
+cargo +nightly fuzz run fuzz_migrate_request
+
+# Run notify-keyspace-events parser fuzzer
+cargo +nightly fuzz run fuzz_keyspace_events
+
+# Run event-loop validator/state-machine fuzzer
+cargo +nightly fuzz run fuzz_eventloop_validators
+
 # Run round-trip invariant checker
 cargo +nightly fuzz run fuzz_resp_roundtrip
 ```

@@ -0,0 +1 @@
+CLIENT TRACKING ON BCAST PREFIX foo PREFIX bar NOLOOP
